recommendations.title: Daniel Isn't Real
recommendations.overview: A troubled college freshman resurrects his imaginary friend to help him cope with a violent trauma.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Drama
recommendations.overview: A young wizard accidentally conjures a spell that puts her family in jeopardy.

recommendations.title: Holidays
recommendations.overview: An anthology feature film that puts a uniquely dark and original spin on some of the most iconic and beloved holidays of all time by challenging our folklore, traditions and assumptions.

recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.

recommendations.title: Some Guy Who Kills People
recommendations.overview: A former mental patient's repressed anger reaches the boiling point, leading him to embark on a mission of revenge against the thugs who once subjected him to severe physical and mental trauma.

recommendations.title: The Hourglass Sanatorium
recommendations.overview: Jozef visits a dilapidated Sanatorium to see his father. Jozef undertakes a strange journey through the many rooms of the sanatorium, each which conjures worlds composed of his memories, dreams and nightmares.
